---
title: "dialogue.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\security_verify\.agents\scripts\engine\dialogue.py"
loc: 27
complexity: 4
logic_score: 3.40
style_score: 4.03
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.24
---

## Intent
The `dialogue.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on DialogueRetriever, __init__, _load, get, __repr__. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via DialogueRetriever, __init__, _load, get, __repr__. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [random](file://random)

### Exports
- `DialogueRetriever`
- `__init__`
- `_load`
- `get`
- `__repr__`
